mapper.select:
SELECT dc.checklist_id, dc.checklist_name, dc.site_cd, si.site_name, dc.common_yn, dc.use_yn, dc.sort_ord, dc.reg_id, DATE_FORMAT(dc.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reg_dt, dc.upd_id, DATE_FORMAT(dc.upd_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS upd_dt, COUNT(dci.item_id) AS item_count FROM daily_checklist dc LEFT JOIN site_info si ON si.site_cd = dc.site_cd AND si.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN daily_checklist_item dci ON dci.checklist_id = dc.checklist_id AND dci.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE 1 = 1
GROUP BY dc.checklist_id, dc.checklist_name, dc.site_cd, si.site_name, dc.common_yn, dc.use_yn, dc.sort_ord, dc.reg_id, dc.reg_dt, dc.upd_id, dc.upd_dt ORDER BY dc.sort_ord ASC, dc.checklist_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_checklist dc WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT dc.checklist_id, dc.checklist_name, dc.site_cd, si.site_name, dc.common_yn, dc.use_yn, dc.sort_ord, dc.reg_id, DATE_FORMAT(dc.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reg_dt, dc.upd_id, DATE_FORMAT(dc.upd_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS upd_dt FROM daily_checklist dc LEFT JOIN site_info si ON si.site_cd = dc.site_cd AND si.del_yn = 'N' WHERE dc.checklist_id = #{checklistId}

SELECT dci.item_id, dci.checklist_id, dci.item_name, dci.input_type, cc.cd_code_nm AS input_type_nm, dci.required_yn, dci.use_yn, dci.sort_ord FROM daily_checklist_item dci LEFT JOIN cd_common cc ON cc.cd_div = 'CHECK_INPUT_TYPE' AND cc.cd_code = dci.input_type AND cc.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE dci.checklist_id = #{checklistId} ORDER BY dci.sort_ord ASC, dci.item_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_checklist ( checklist_name, site_cd, common_yn, use_yn, sort_ord, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{checklistName}, #{siteCd}, #{commonYn}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrd}, #{regId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE daily_checklist SET checklist_name = #{checklistName}, site_cd = #{siteCd}, common_yn = #{commonYn}, use_yn = #{useYn}, sort_ord = #{sortOrd}, upd_id = #{updId}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE checklist_id = #{checklistId}
UPDATE daily_checklist SET use_yn = 'N', upd_id = #{updId}, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE checklist_id = #{checklistId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_checklist_item ( checklist_id, item_name, input_type, required_yn, use_yn, sort_ord ) VALUES ( #{checklistId}, #{itemName}, #{inputType}, #{requiredYn}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrd} )
